text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out one day with Yaeno Muteki, we head
to a mountain at her request.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for dragging you to such a place. The
truth is, I've discovered that the missing Yaegaki
student is actually somewhere around here.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am familiar with these notions. I am also familiar
with someone else who feels this way.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My senior... She felt empty after mastering the
martial arts and ended up abandoning our school.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I may be able to get through to her now... At
least, I think I've grown enough to do so.
choice_data_list:
But do you think we'll be able to find her on
this vast mountain?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We won't need to find her. She's been watching us
since the moment we set foot here.

Oho, I heard you'd chosen to walk the path of
racing... I'm surprised to see your senses are still
sharp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the next instant, a huge Umamusume clad in a
ragged martial arts uniform tied with a straw rope
descends from the trees above.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time. I was surprised to hear you
were in a place like this.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
This is all that's left for me. I've done everything
there is for me in civilized society. If nothing else,
taking on the great outdoors has helped stave off
the emptiness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Was there truly no other path for you? A life like
this offers only a temporary reprieve...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You could continue to polish your skills and serve
as an inspiration to the students who looked up
to you. That could be your life.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. What good is it to learn from someone
who's lost their way?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe someday you'll know how I feel. Once
you've mastered the path of racing, you might
end up staring into the same empty abyss.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You're just making excuses!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Do you know what I've learned in the world of
racing? That you'll never reach the end of your
path as long you can compete against your fellow
runners! Because you push each other to greater
heights!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When the next generation chooses their own
paths, they will look at the ones we have taken.
The very connections we make with others forge
these paths!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You have your own friendly rivals at the dojo, do
you not?! And don't forget the students who look
up to you! Even those who suffered defeat at your
hands are training for a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How can you just ignore them all and claim to feel
nothing but emptiness?! Cease this selfish
nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You've always been one to use words
excessively. So you came all the way here just to
give me a lecture, huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No! I came here to prove to you that connections are what lead to growth! And that's why...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will expertly deflect your mightiest strike!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like when Yaeno Muteki said she wanted
to "get through to her," she didn't mean with
words—she meant using a method that only a
fellow martial arts practitioner would understand.
choice_data_list: Hold on... This is way too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm aware of the risks! Fear not... The teachings I have learned from you are firmly ingrained within me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
...Bring it on. I'm not so dishonorable that I'd
refuse a duel with an earnest opponent. Oh, but...
I won't be holding back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The older Kongo Yaegaki student assumes a low
stance, exuding a violent ferocity as she slowly
closes the distance between herself and Yaeno
Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(It comes without shadow or sound, felling all in
its wake—it is the ultimate strike and the final
Yaegaki technique. However... my heart is free of
fear!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Yes! With my mentor by my side, I have
conquered countless battles against formidable
foes!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The raging blaze fierce and the calming water
still... A brief tip in the balance causes her to be
blown backward. But the side of her that finally
overcomes her opponent's technique is...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Urgh! Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Water still... So that's the strength you gained
through your connections with others?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Cough... In that instant, the memories I've made with the people I met along my path... imbued me with water's ultimate wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Our master said something to me once, and
looking at you just now reminded me... "Consider
every person you meet on your path a mentor."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Guess it's time for a reset. I'm gonna start my
training over from square one... I'd better head
back to the dojo and apologize to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The reason I was able to act as a mentor to her is
because I've been surrounded by wise mentors
myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My master, my friends... and you, Trainer.
choice_data_list: In that case, you're also a mentor to me!
In that case, you're also a mentor to me!
I wonder if she'll be okay...
I wonder if she'll be okay...

You could probably start your own school at
this point.

You could probably start your own school at
this point.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My master, my friends... and you, Trainer.
choice_data_list: In that case, you're also a mentor to me!
In that case, you're also a mentor to me!
I wonder if she'll be okay...
I wonder if she'll be okay...

You could probably start your own school at
this point.

You could probably start your own school at
this point.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It is an honor to hear that... Yes, let's consider
that observation to be a truth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It appears that we see ourselves in one other, and
therein find inspiration to better.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That could well be the ideal mentor-student
relationship... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set off back to the academy alongside an
uplifted Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She will. Now that her misgivings have been
expelled, there's little cause for concern. I expect
she will become even stronger, and the next time
our paths cross, I might even fail to evade her
strike.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As I continue down my path, I will surely come
across others who have lost their way.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I do, I hope I can be worthy to serve as a
mentor to them. That is my greatest hope at this
moment...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set off back to the academy alongside an
uplifted Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No, I'm far from ready. The earliest I could even contemplate such a thing would be after accomplishing my greater goal.
choice_data_list: Are you talking about our goal race?
Are you talking about our goal race?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. The goal I speak of is for you to someday
acknowledge my skills, and proclaim me master.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To achieve my boundless goals, I will continue to
devote myself to progress!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set off back to the academy alongside an
uplifted Yaeno Muteki.
